description: Allowlist of source paths inside the dev-repo checkout that sync-content.mjs is permitted to read. Anything not on this list is invisible to the build. The dev-repo checkout's root is referenced as the sync-script's --dev-repo argument; every entry's 'source' is relative to that root.

sources.notes: Privacy_Policy.md and any future policies. US-156 transform: parse YAML frontmatter via gray-matter; if absent, synthesise { title, effectiveDate } from the first H1 and the first '**Effective date:** ...' line. Strip lines starting with '<!-- internal:'. Neutralise markdown links whose host matches *.cloudfunctions.net / console.firebase.google.com / mputaala.github.io/Frame (anchor text preserved as plain text). Compute slug from H1 with a trailing ' Policy' stripped before kebab-casing, so 'Privacy Policy' -> 'privacy'. Fail the build on missing / empty source files or slug collisions.

Curated PNG screenshots. The 'source' here is a security boundary — every entry in config/screenshot-allowlist.json must resolve under this path. The dev repo's actual screenshots live under nested per-feature subdirectories (e.g. '01 — Welcome to FramePath/Final/', '10 — Storyboarding/Final/') rather than a single flat Final/ directory; the boundary therefore broadens to the parent. Sharp-driven AVIF/WebP/PNG triplet pipeline + 400w WebP thumbnail per entry lands in US-158; the per-screenshot allowlist drives selection.

Visitor-facing feature copy (Write / Plan / Shoot). Issue mputaala/Frame#283 corrected the source from 'Documentation/Features' (internal technical docs) to 'Documentation/Marketing' (visitor-facing copy) so the public /features pages stop showing engineering notes. Same published-gate semantics as before; an `order` frontmatter field controls index sort order (Write -> Plan -> Shoot rather than alphabetical).
